title: Community unites to support young rugby player
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS - The Smutsville Community Hall sparkled with style last weekend as Sedgefield hosted a modelling show to raise funds for Sergio Solomons, a Knysna High School learner who was selected for the Travel and Sport Invitational U15 rugby team that tours to England and Wales from 2 to 13 December.","html":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS - The Smutsville Community Hall sparkled with style last weekend as Sedgefield hosted a modelling show to raise funds for Sergio Solomons, a Knysna High School learner who was selected for the Travel and Sport Invitational U15 rugby team that tours to England and Wales from 2 to 13 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vernie Solomons, Sergio's father, praised the community's efforts, saying,","html":"Vernie Solomons, Sergio's father, praised the community's efforts, saying,"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"The models put on quite a show, and I'm so grateful for everyone's planning and contributions.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He also expressed pride in his son's achievement, crediting coach Dorian Johnson for spotting Sergio's talent early on.","html":"He also expressed pride in his son's achievement, crediting coach Dorian Johnson for spotting Sergio's talent early on."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Community unites to support young rugby player
